channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Coachella 2027 Dates Announced
item.description: 🌴🎶 Start planning your festival outfits! Coachella 2027 dates are here. Who's already dreaming of those desert vibes? 🔥 #Coachella2027

item.title: Death Lens – “Waiting To Know” (Feat. Militarie Gun’s Ian Shelton)
item.description: 🎶 Emo legends Death Lens team up with Ian Shelton for a powerful new track! 🔥 #MusicNews #CollaborationGoals 🎸

item.title: Tour news: Jane Remover, Bleachers’ ‘Shadow of the City’ 2026, Beth Orton, Erykah Badu, more
item.description: 🎶✨ Exciting tour lineup alert! Get ready to groove with Jane Remover, Bleachers, Beth Orton, Erykah Badu, and more in 2026! 🎵🔥 #MusicNews

item.title: New Prince Single “With This Tear” Released Ahead of Vault Project: Stream
item.description: 🎵 Dive into the legendary Prince's latest single "With This Tear" and get a sneak peek of his upcoming Vault Project! 💜🎶 #Prince #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Lorde, Geese, Turnstile, and More to Play Form Arcosanti 2026
item.description: 🎶 The lineup for Form Arcosanti 2026 is 🔥 Who else is stoked for Lorde, Geese, Turnstile, and more? Let's dance! 💃🕺 #musicfestivals #livemusic
